case_title: FRANK-LIN DISTILLERS LTD VS. YAC & AT CORP. (DBA UNIQUE FRENCH BISTRO) ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,548.08 FILED BY FRANK-LIN DISTILLERS LTD AS TO DEFENDANT YAC & AT CORP. (DBA UNIQUE FRENCH BISTRO) LEGALZOOM.COM INC. (AGENT FOR SERVICE) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-16-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $85.00) SERVED JAN-30-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LEGALZOOM.COM INC. (AGENT FOR SERVICE)
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO LEGALZOOM.COM INC. (AGENT FOR SERVICE) BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF APR-20-2015 AT 6:30 PM.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-16-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-20-2015 AT 6:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. THE PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. THE PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED THROUGH STEVE WATTS (TITLE: SALES REPRESENTATIVE). THE DEFENDANTS WERE NOT PRESENT. DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO LEGALZOOM.COM, INC. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL, CLERK KEVIN LEE, NOT REPORTED, D506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT YAC & AT CORP. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AGAINST DEFT. LEGALZOOM INC. ON 3/16/15. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. PRO TEM JUDGE: MORGAN PRICKETT. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
